All right, Jim Launchers. So we just finished making our submissions app. So I wanted to go over an additional step, adding any text message notification. And it's going to send you a pin for that information. I've already done this. So I'm going to go ahead and just select my account. But you will want to go through that verification process. So you have a new lead. And then I'm going to put in the name of the person and match that up from ClickFunnels. And then I'm going to give myself their phone number and match that up from ClickFunnels. And this is so I can nurture my leads more quickly and give them a call immediately.
